init.title: Venice AI Options
init.description: Configure Venice AI settings. Only models with function calling support are shown.

deprecated_model.title: Deprecated Venice AI model
deprecated_model.description: The model {model} is deprecated. Consider switching to {replacement}.

unavailable_model.title: Unavailable Venice AI {model_type} model
unavailable_model.description: The model {model} is no longer available from Venice AI. Please update your integration settings to select a supported model.

api_unavailable.title: Venice AI API unavailable
api_unavailable.description: The Venice AI API is unreachable for {entry_title}: {error}.

rate_limited.title: Venice AI rate limit exceeded
rate_limited.description: The Venice AI API rate limit has been exceeded for {entry_title}. The integration will retry automatically.

invalid_config_entry.message: Config entry {config_entry} is not a Venice AI entry.

entity_not_found.message: Venice AI Task entity not found for config entry {entry_id}.
